---
name: Refactoring Template
about: Template for creating a refactoring card.
title: RF_XX.YYY.ZZ | ClassName > methodName
labels: RF
type: Task
---
**ID:** RF_XX.YYY.ZZ | ClassName > methodName

_Legend for the card title:_
_**RF** — Refactor_
_**XX** — epic ID_
_**YYY** — user story ID_
_**ZZ** — test case ID_
_**ClassName > methodName** — what exactly is affected_

**Description:**

[This test contains code that can be simplified, made more maintainable,
or a fragment of code was identified that can be simplified, made more 
readable, or aligned with best practices. The goal is to preserve existing 
behavior while improving internal implementation.]
